headline: Citi Updates Constellation Brands (STZ) to Buy From Neutral – Here’s Why
summary: Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE:STZ) is one of the best undervalued defensive stocks for 2026. Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE:STZ) received a rating update from Citi on March 18. The firm updated the stock to Buy from Neutral, while raising the price target to $175 from $155. Citi told investors in a research note that beer scanner […]

headline: What You Need to Know Ahead of Constellation Brands’ Earnings Release
summary: Constellation Brands is set to report its fourth-quarter earnings next month, and analysts expect a double-digit decline in profits, pointing to near-term margin and growth pressures.
